name: Over The Door Flexible Storage - 3pk - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your bags, toys and other items organized out of sight with the 3-Pack of Over-The-Door Flexible Storage from Brightroom™. This flexible storage pack features a mesh design to make it easy to identify the items. Made of fabric, this over-the-door storage pack is great for your entryway, sleeping area or any other space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
